# llms.txt ‚Äî Cyber-Arcade

> A static, gamified cyber-security learning PWA with no backend.

## Summary
- **Name:** Cyber-Arcade
- **Type:** Single-page static PWA
- **Stack:** Modern HTML, modern CSS, modern JavaScript (vanilla ES modules)
- **Storage:** IndexedDB
- **Theme:** Retro 8-bit arcade cabinet
- **Deployment:** GitHub Pages / any static CDN
- **Repo root:** `C:\Projects\Devin-Agent-Test`

## Architecture
- `index.html` bootstraps the app and loads `src/main.js` as an ES module.
- `src/app.js` orchestrates state, routing, and rendering.
- `src/router.js` maps paths to views using `history.pushState` and dispatches custom events.
- `src/services/db.js` wraps IndexedDB for profiles, progress, badges, and settings.
- `src/services/store.js` is a tiny reactive store that components subscribe to.
- `src/services/progress.js` reads/writes challenge completion.
- `src/services/gamify.js` computes XP, levels, streaks, badges, and daily challenges.
- `src/components/` contains Web Components (vanilla custom elements).
- `src/labs/` contains the `LabRunner` and safe `postMessage` protocol.
- `src/modules/<domain>/<challenge>/` contains challenge manifests and lab code.
- `src/sw.js` caches assets for offline use.
- `manifest.json` makes the app installable.

## Technologies
- HTML5: semantic elements, `<dialog>`, `<details>`, `<template>`, `<canvas>`, `<iframe sandbox>`.
- CSS: custom properties, `@layer`, `@property`, container queries, subgrid, view transitions, `color-mix`, `oklch`, `prefers-reduced-motion`.
- JS: ES modules, private fields, top-level await, `async/await`, `structuredClone`, `BroadcastChannel`, `AbortController`, `ResizeObserver`, `IntersectionObserver`, `Web Animations API`, `Canvas 2D`.
- APIs: IndexedDB, Service Worker, Cache Storage, Web Crypto.

## Entry points
- App: `index.html`
- Script: `src/main.js`
- Worker: `src/sw.js`
- Manifest: `manifest.json`

## Documentation index
- `AGENTS.md` ‚Äî agent conventions, quick start, build/deploy, security rules.
- `DESIGN.md` ‚Äî design system (colors, typography, spacing, components, animation).
- `ARCHITECTURE.md` ‚Äî system design, module layout, data flow.
- `DATABASE.md` ‚Äî IndexedDB schema, stores, indexes, migrations.
- `STYLEGUIDE.md` ‚Äî naming, formatting, code conventions.
- `SECURITY.md` ‚Äî threat model, sandbox, CSP, no-eval policy.
- `TESTING.md` ‚Äî testing strategy, verification checklist.
- `PROMPTS.md` ‚Äî reusable prompts and agent workflows.
- `MEMORY.md` ‚Äî long-term context, recurring decisions, unresolved issues.
- `ROADMAP.md` ‚Äî planned features and milestones.
- `DECISIONS.md` ‚Äî architecture decision records.
- `API.md` ‚Äî client-only API (no backend endpoints).
- `CONTRIBUTING.md` ‚Äî workflow for human contributors.
- `README.md` ‚Äî human-facing quick start and project description.

## For agents
Before writing code, read `AGENTS.md` and `DESIGN.md`. Add new modules under `src/modules/<domain>/<challenge>/` and register them in `src/modules/<domain>/index.js`. Keep all challenge code free of `eval` and user-supplied script execution.
